title: HUF Standing Assessment — Can HUF Stand On Its Feet?
triggered_by: Peter asked 'can huf stand on its feet' + Gemini's assessment
verdict: YES — on three legs (compression + diagnostic detection + conditional forward signal). Not yet on four (missing control, universality, formal proofs, multi-domain CL-03 replication).

verdict_update.prior_verdict: YES — on two legs (compression + diagnostic detection). March 19.
verdict_update.updated_march_21: YES — on three legs. March 21. CL03-SENS-001 and CL03-SENS-002 provided first real-data evidence of conditional forward-looking signal: deceptive drift predicts elevated TV at 10-20 day horizons (p<0.001), split-sample validated. Two independent PLL channels identified (entropy + PCA). Split-half stability emerges as strongest predictor (r=-0.22 at 20d).
verdict_update.updated_march_22: YES — on three assured legs plus a conditional fourth. March 22. Forward signal triad conditionally met across 3 domains (finance, electricity, GDP sectors) with 4 significant findings at 3 temporal resolutions. Fourth leg remains conditional: each non-finance finding is single-country, no split-sample validation for non-finance domains, signal specific to internal concentration regime. Critical discovery: deceptive drift detects internal structural concentration, not external forcing events. Ramsar gate opens for planning, subject to conditions. L2/TV metric correction applied — all four pillar p-values stable under both metrics.
verdict_update.updated_verdict: YES — on three assured legs plus a conditional fourth. March 22.
verdict_update.headline_correction: ChatGPT review (March 22) flagged 'four legs' as over-reaching given body caveats. Downgraded: leg 4 (forward signal) is conditional, not assured. House rule: headlines may not be stronger than the strongest caveat-bearing verdict in the body.
verdict_update.what_changed: Forward signal triad tested and conditionally met. Finance p<0.001 (daily, split-sample), EMBER/Germany p=0.0016 (monthly, deseasonalized), GDP/Japan p=0.0098 (annual, 5yr drift), GDP/China p=0.0196 (annual, 3yr drift). Seasonal confound detected and corrected in EMBER V1→V2. Internal-vs-external distinction discovered: signal detects gradual internal homogenization, not sudden external shocks. Ramsar gate opens.

domain_details.finance: S&P 500, 9 sectors, 120 stocks, 1535 daily. p<0.001, split-sample validated, 69 drift days, two PLL channels.
domain_details.electricity: EMBER monthly, 9 fuel types, 5 countries. Germany gas crisis 2022 p=0.0016 (deseasonalized). Other shocks MISS.
domain_details.gdp_sectors: World Bank WDI, 3 sectors, 10 countries, up to 65 years. Japan 2008 p=0.0098 (5yr drift), China 2020 p=0.0196 (3yr drift).

P8_conditional_forward_signal.critical_distinction: Deceptive drift detects INTERNAL structural concentration, NOT external forcing events. Fukushima, France nuclear, COVID (most countries), all sudden shocks MISS. Signal sees gradual homogenization behind apparent stability.
P8_conditional_forward_signal.triad_status: CONDITIONALLY MET — 3 domains, 4 significant findings, 3 temporal resolutions
P8_conditional_forward_signal.status: PROVEN across domains (conditional on internal structural concentration regime)
caveats: Each non-finance finding is one country, one event
No split-sample validation for non-finance domains yet
High base drift rates in some countries (China 27%, France 29%)
GDP sector carrier has only 3 elements — low dimensionality
Seasonal confound detected and corrected in EMBER (V1→V2)

findings: Backblaze K_eff vs failure rate: r=-0.056, p=0.56 (T5a)
Gold/silver currency structure vs ratio: R²=-28, direction 47.8% (GS-001)
P9_orthogonality_boundary.status: PROVEN — RSM correctly identifies information boundaries

supported_not_proven.S4_holts_prediction: PARTIALLY ADDRESSED — deceptive drift provides conditional prediction (CL03-SENS-001/002). Not Holts-specific, but demonstrates forward signal exists.

claimed_not_proven.C5_ramsar_ready: No Ramsar data processed. Ramsar gate opens for planning, subject to conditions (March 22). Forward signal triad conditionally met. Deceptive drift would detect gradual ecosystem homogenization (species loss, water quality decline) but not sudden external events (hurricanes, oil spills). Actual Ramsar engagement requires: (1) ecological carrier construction from real data, (2) baseline assessment, (3) validation of drift detection in ecological domain.

gemini_assessment_check.main_error: Treats HUF as finished instrument; it is a validated diagnostic framework with proven compression and detection capabilities

paper_readiness.defensible_now: Three-assured-leg paper with conditional fourth: (1) ratio-state compression across 8 domains (TRIAD ASSURED), (2) structural detection with orthogonality boundary calibration (TRIAD ASSURED), (3) conditional forward signal via deceptive drift (finance, split-sample validated), (4) cross-domain forward signal generalization (electricity + GDP sectors, triad conditionally met — fourth leg conditional, not assured). The internal-vs-external distinction (detects gradual structural concentration, not sudden external shocks) is a precise and defensible claim. L2/TV metric correction (March 22) confirmed all four pillar p-values stable under both L2_drift and tv_distance.
paper_readiness.not_defensible_yet: Universal forward signal (conditional, not universal), continuous prediction, control (CL-04/CL-05), formal mathematical completeness, split-sample validation for non-finance domains
paper_readiness.recommendation: Write the paper on three assured legs with the fourth presented as conditional evidence. Eight-domain compression + 7-axis detection + orthogonality boundaries are the assured foundation. Forward signal + cross-domain triad is supporting evidence with explicit caveats. The negative findings (Fukushima MISS, France MISS, seasonal confound caught and corrected, expenditure carrier negative, L2/TVD divergence in China OWID) strengthen the paper — they show honest, self-correcting methodology. The internal-vs-external distinction is publishable by itself.
paper_readiness.updated: 2026-03-22, post forward signal triad (EMBER, OWID, GDP) + internal-vs-external discovery
